title: Slow Hopper
description: A new cheaper, but slower hopper
body:
Its 4 times slower than hoppers. 0.625 items a second. One item every 32 ticks.

Craft it the same way as a hopper, except use iron nuggets instead of iron ingots.
It follows all the rules of a regular hopper including redstone signals.

![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HVLpu30t/images/c0972a524db3ab189dc88ff7b075822b2eb6b76f.png)

See [my other mods](https://modrinth.com/user/Pepsied)
